description: Add 'Amoxicillin 500mg Capsule' to the hospital formulary using the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin). Use the Bahmni login credentials (Username: superman, Password: Admin123). The drug must be linked to the 'AMOXICILLIN' concept with a strength of '500mg' and the combination flag set to false. Ensure the medication is correctly linked and available in the system.
